creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

thanks for submitting this patch.
However I have problems building libhangul after having applied the patch
as shown with the following tinderbox run log:

http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/tinderbox/8.2-FreeBSD/ko-libhangul-0.0.12.log

Could you have a look at it please?

culot@
